units.name: Master Chief
units.description: The legendary Spartan-II super-soldier. Master Chief Petty Officer John-117.

units.name: Spartan MK VII
units.description: Versatile Spartan-IV in Mjolnir MK VII armor. Standard multi-role configuration.

units.name: Spartan Zvezda
units.description: Medium-range specialist Spartan-IV. Excels at sustained fire at mid-range engagements.

units.name: Spartan Deadeye
units.description: Long-range Spartan-IV marksman. Optimized for precision fire from distance.

units.name: Spartan Brawler
units.description: Close-range Spartan-IV specialist. Built for aggressive assaults and tight-quarters fighting.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

units.name: Spartan CQB
units.description: Close-quarters battle Spartan-IV. Deadly in melee, equipped with battlefield-recovered Covenant blades.

units.name: Spartan HAZOP
units.description: Hazardous Operations Spartan-IV. Suited for toxic and extreme environment combat.

units.name: Spartan Gungnir
units.description: Heavy weapons Spartan-IV. Specializes in explosive and energy-based ordnance.

units.name: Sangheili Mercenary
units.description: Elite Sangheili warrior fighting for profit. Can be recruited by either UNSC or Banished fireteams.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

options.name: Energy Sword
options.description: Covenant plasma blade — devastating in close combat.

options.name: Energy Dagger
options.description: Short-range plasma blade for initial close combat.

units.name: Spartan JFO
units.description: Joint Fires Observer Spartan-IV. Battlefield coordinator and fire support specialist.

options.name: Target Locator
options.description: Calls in orbital strike on marked targets.

specialOrders.name: Snap Shot
specialOrders.description: When an opponent's model moves into a cube with one of your models using an Advance or Sprint action that would trigger a free Assault, spend a Special Order die to have your model make a free Shoot action against the attacker before the Assault. Cannot be used if your model is Pinned or shares the cube with another enemy.

specialOrders.name: Army of One
specialOrders.description: At the start of Master Chief's activation, spend a Special Order result to use any number of Advance, Assault, or Command dice results during that activation. Master Chief may also use the Snap Shot special order.

specialOrders.name: Return to Sender
specialOrders.description: When a grenade lands in a Spartan's cube, spend a Special Order result to attempt to catch and throw it back. Roll a 3-dice Survive test (2). On 2+ successes, throw the grenade as if making a Shoot action — it's your grenade now.

units.name: Atriox
units.description: Legendary Jiralhanae warlord who defied the Covenant and built the Banished from their survivors. Wields Chainbreaker.

units.name: Sangheili Mercenary
units.description: Elite Sangheili warrior fighting for profit. Can be recruited by either UNSC or Banished fireteams.

options.name: Needler
options.description: Crystal shards track and supercombine on targets.

options.name: Energy Sword
options.description: Covenant plasma blade — devastating in close combat.

options.name: Energy Dagger
options.description: Short-range plasma blade for initial close combat.

units.name: Jiralhanae Berserker
units.description: Frenzied Jiralhanae warrior who fights with unrestrained ferocity. Armed with wrist blades.

units.name: Jiralhanae Captain
units.description: Banished squad leader. Carries heavy weaponry and Jiralhanae power gauntlets for close combat.

units.name: Jiralhanae Warrior
units.description: Standard Banished Jiralhanae trooper. Armed with a scavenged VK78 Commando, spike grenade, and fists.

units.name: Jiralhanae Sniper
units.description: Long-range Jiralhanae marksman. Capable of eliminating targets at extreme distances.

options.name: Shock Rifle + Disruptor + Fists
options.description: Shock damage disrupts electronics and chaining bolts.

units.name: Jiralhanae Chosen Warrior
units.description: Elite Jiralhanae warrior selected for honor and strength. Armed with Sentinel Beam, spike grenade, and fists.

specialOrders.name: Reinforcements Incoming
specialOrders.description: After any activation, spend a Special Order result to remove the activation token from a friendly Sangheili Mercenary that is off the board (killed but not respawned). That model must then be activated before the end of the current round.

specialOrders.name: Alliance
specialOrders.description: If a friendly Banished model is in the same or an adjacent cube at the start of this model's activation, the active model may take the same short action twice during its activation.

specialOrders.name: Rampage
specialOrders.description: If the active Jiralhanae has 2 or more wounds, spend a Special Order result to add 1 to their Speed stat for a Sprint action this activation. The sprint must end in a cube with an enemy model. May reroll 1 die in the resulting Fight test.

specialOrders.name: Defiance
specialOrders.description: If a friendly model begins their activation Pinned, spend a Special Order result to perform a free Stand Up action first, then continue with the model's normal 2 short / 1 long actions. Atriox may also use special orders available to Jiralhanae.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Command Die
commandUpgrades.detail: Gain an extra Command Die every round.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Command Die (Single Use)
commandUpgrades.detail: Once per game: gain an extra Command Die for one round. Declare before rolling.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra d8 (Single Use)
commandUpgrades.detail: Once per game: roll an extra d8 alongside a Symbol command die result.

commandUpgrades.name: Extra Recon Roll
commandUpgrades.detail: Gain an extra roll on the Recon table (Winner or Loser table, as appropriate).

keywords.name: Accurate
keywords.description: Headshots occur on 7 and 8 (instead of 8 only).

keywords.name: Active Camouflage
keywords.description: If the model has fully charged Energy Shields, ranged attacks against it do not gain Clear Shot (+2), High Ground (+1), or Crouched (+1) modifiers.

keywords.name: Blast
keywords.description: Before damage is resolved, all models in cubes adjacent to the explosion have 1 Energy Shield depleted.

keywords.name: Concussive
keywords.description: If the attacker rolls more successes than the target, the target is Pinned in addition to any damage caused.

keywords.name: Continuous Fire
keywords.description: Gains Weight of Fire (2). After shooting, the model must pass a 3-dice Survive test (2) or suffer 1 wound (bypasses shields and armour).

keywords.name: EMP
keywords.description: Depletes all Energy Shields on all models in the target cube, including the target.

keywords.name: Energy Shield
keywords.description: Start with (n) Energy Shields that absorb Hits before armour. 1 shield regenerates at the start of each round (up to maximum n).

keywords.name: Energy Shield Barrier
keywords.description: Protects all models in a cube from ranged attacks only. Does not regenerate at round start.

keywords.name: Evade
keywords.description: When targeted by a Shoot action but not killed, Pinned, or forcibly moved, may immediately make a free 1-cube Advance (which can trigger an Assault).

keywords.name: Explosive
keywords.description: Targets a cube in LOS. Roll 3 dice Ranged test (1). On failure, scatter to an adjacent cube. No opposed roll — resolve the explosive type keyword on the affected cube.

keywords.name: Fast Transition
keywords.description: When taking a Shoot action, make attacks with two ranged weapons targeting the same or different models. Resolve each weapon separately. Cannot be used with long Shoot actions.

keywords.name: Fearless
keywords.description: Can never be Pinned (even if caused by other keywords). Additional effects from attacks still apply.

keywords.name: Firing Platform
keywords.description: Gains +(n) dice when performing a Shoot action.

keywords.name: Flight
keywords.description: Can pass through cubes without walls or floors during movement and change levels without climbing. Does not take damage or get Pinned from falling.

keywords.name: Frag
keywords.description: Roll (n) dice 4+ test for strength. Each model in the target cube rolls a 3-dice Survive test. Survivors are thrown one cube in a random direction and Pinned.

keywords.name: Furious
keywords.description: Atriox's unique ferocity — represents his unmatched savagery in close combat.

keywords.name: Grenade
keywords.description: Thrown using a Shoot action targeting a cube in LOS. Roll 3 dice Ranged test (1). On failure, Scatter determines where it lands. Bounces off solid walls.

keywords.name: Guarded
keywords.description: When targeted by a Shoot action using a Ranged test, 8s (or 7s) are successes but grant no extra dice — no Headshots.

keywords.name: Horde
keywords.description: During a Fight, gains the normal friendly model bonus plus +1 die for each additional friendly Horde model in the same cube.

keywords.name: Implosion
keywords.description: Roll (n) dice 4+ test for strength. Each model in the target cube rolls a 3-dice Survive test. Difference in successes = Hits caused.

keywords.name: Imposing
keywords.description: Receives a +1 die modifier in Fight or Survive dice tests during an Assault.

keywords.name: Jump Pack
keywords.description: Takes no damage or pin from Falling. Can move up/down levels without climbing, jump over full-cube-height walls, and jump gaps up to 1 cube wide.

keywords.name: Knockback
keywords.description: When rolling more successes than the target (regardless of wounds), force the target 1 cube directly away. In Assault, attacker chooses direction.

keywords.name: Lethal
keywords.description: A model that suffers wounds from this weapon takes (n) additional wounds in total. Cumulative if multiple Lethal modifiers apply.

keywords.name: Life Support
keywords.description: If the model suffers wounds but is not killed, it is immediately returned to an undamaged state. One-Use. Cannot resurrect models killed outright.

keywords.name: Long
keywords.description: A normal Shoot action with this weapon is a long action (uses both short actions for the activation).

keywords.name: Lunge
keywords.description: Used with a Shoot action but only benefits from Clear Shot and High Ground modifiers. Uses the Fight stat instead of Ranged stat.

keywords.name: Medic
keywords.description: May perform an Auxiliary action to remove 1 Wound Marker from a friendly model in the same cube.

keywords.name: Optics
keywords.description: Adds +1 die to Shoot actions. Headshots occur on 7 and 8. Cannot be used during Blaze Away.

keywords.name: Pack Mule
keywords.description: May carry up to 3 Items, 2 picked-up weapons, and 2 scenario objects.

keywords.name: Rapid Fire
keywords.description: May 'Blaze Away' instead of shooting normally. Roll 4 dice Ranged vs. 3 dice Survive. If shooter wins: 1 Energy Shield depleted and target Pinned. No wounds caused.

keywords.name: Scout
keywords.description: After deployment but before Round 1, make a free 1-cube Advance. May not enter a cube with an enemy. Can keep a Crouch token when advancing.

keywords.name: Smash
keywords.description: Gains +(n) dice when performing a Fight test.

keywords.name: Sniper Scope
keywords.description: Choose a normal short Shoot (no bonus) or a long action Shoot (+2 dice, Headshots on 7 or 8). Declare before rolling.

keywords.name: Stable
keywords.description: May ignore the Long keyword on any weapon when making an Advance followed by a Shoot action in the same activation.

keywords.name: Stealthy
keywords.description: When targeted by a Shoot action with Clear Shot, the opponent only gains +1 die (instead of +2) for that modifier.

keywords.name: Sticky
keywords.description: If 3 or more successes are rolled on the Ranged test, all Energy Shields of 1 affected model are depleted.

keywords.name: Stoic
keywords.description: Can never be Pinned (even from other keywords). Cannot take the Crouch action. Additional attack effects still apply.

keywords.name: Support Weapon
keywords.description: Model may not Sprint, throw grenades, or make Fight tests in Assault. Advance actions only use Speed 1.

keywords.name: Suppression
keywords.description: In addition to normal Hits and Wounds, all models in the same cube as the target (both sides) are Pinned.

keywords.name: Tactician
keywords.description: Adds (n) Command Dice each round, allows (n) rerolls of Command Dice, and may carry over (n) unused Command Dice between rounds. Multiple Tacticians stack their values.

keywords.name: Unstoppable
keywords.description: When triggering an Assault by moving into a cube, receives +3 dice to the Fight test instead of the normal +2.

keywords.name: Weight of Fire
keywords.description: May reroll (n) dice when making Ranged tests. Cumulative — add together values from multiple sources.
